Our Story

About

Tea, art, and community in the heart of Waynesville

More Than a Tea Shop

Art Expressions | Infinite Tea is a place where the warmth of a good cup of tea meets the joy of discovering something beautiful. Nestled on High Street in historic Waynesville — known as the Antiques Capital of the Midwest — our shop is part tea house, part art gallery, and part treasure hunt.

We carry over 225 varieties of loose-leaf tea from around the world, alongside a curated collection of art, handmade goods, books, soaps, and gifts you won't find anywhere else. Whether you're here for a quiet afternoon in our tea room or searching for the perfect present, there's always something to discover.

What We Believe

01

Every cup tells a story

Tea connects cultures, traditions, and people. We love sharing the stories behind what you're drinking — where it's from, how it's made, and why it tastes the way it does.

02

Art belongs everywhere

From the paintings on our walls to the handcrafted mugs you sip from, we believe in surrounding yourself with things made with care and intention.

03

Community is everything

We're a gathering place for neighbours, friends, and visitors. Everyone is welcome, and a warm cup of tea is always waiting.

Come Say Hello

We're open Monday through Saturday and always happy to chat — about tea, art, life in Waynesville, or whatever's on your mind. Stop in and let us brew something for you.

Find Us
